wordplay_note: From the garden — an ordinary man drawn into revolution
card_description: Nick Appleton (meaning "Appleton = apple town") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Our Friends from Frolix 8*. Ordinary tire regroover who supports the revolution and shelters a fugitive. Name note: From the garden — an ordinary man drawn into revolution. The common man as political actor — PKD's democratic faith. First appears in *Our Friends from Frolix 8*.

reference.brief: Ordinary tire regroover who supports the revolution and shelters a fugitive
reference.significance: The common man as political actor — PKD's democratic faith
